text_blocks.text_content: Exhibit B-8
## Ministry of Education of the People's Republic of China

Ministry of Education of the People's Republic of ChinaInformation Name: Decision of the Ministry of Education on Outstanding Achievement Award for Scientific Research of Higher Education Institutions (Humanities and Social Sciences)Information Index: 360A13- 14- 2009- 0306- 1 Generation Date: September 4, 2009Issue Agency: Ministry of Education of the People's Republic of ChinaDocument Issue No.: Jiao She Ke (2009) 5 Information Category: Scientific ResearchesBrief Introduction to Contents: Ministry of Education announced the results of the Outstanding Achievement Award for Scientific Research of Higher Education Institutions (Humanities and Social Sciences). A total of 648 achievements won the award, including first prize of 38 achievements, second prize of 205 achievements, third prize of 392 achievements, and 13 achievement popularization rewards. Now, we hereby release the list of awards (refer to the appendix for details).
# Decision of the Ministry of Education on the Award for Outstanding Achievements in Scientific Research of Higher Education Institutions (Humanities and Social Sciences)
## Sciences)

The evaluation of the Award for Outstanding Achievements in Scientific Research of Higher Education Institutions (Humanities and Social Sciences), has been completed. According to the Ministry's "Award for Outstanding Achievements in Scientific Research in Higher Education (Humanities and Social Sciences)", a total of 648 achievements have been awarded, including 38 first prizes, 205 second prizes, 392 third prizes and 13 achievement popularization prizes, after evaluation by experts, public announcement and review by the Award Committee. Now the list of winners will be announced (see annex).

The award evaluation work for the Outstanding Achievement Award for Scientific Research of Higher Education Institutions (Humanities and Social Sciences) is an important initiative arranged by the Ministry of Education to commend the outstanding achievements made by workers in humanities and social sciences of national higher education institutions. The purposes of the award are to encourage scientific research personnel to actively explore and dare for innovation under the guide of Marxism and principle of linking theories with practices to promote the innovation in discipline system, academic points of views

## Ministry of Education of the People's Republic of China  

Ministry of Education of the People's Republic of ChinaInformation Name: Decision of the Ministry of Education on Outstanding Achievement Award for Scientific Research of Higher Education Institutions (Humanities and Social Sciences)Information Index: 360A13- 14- 2009- 0306- 1 Generation Date: September 4, 2009Issue Agency: Ministry of Education of the People's Republic of ChinaDocument Issue No.: Jiao She Ke (2009) 5 Information Category: Scientific ResearchesBrief Introduction to Contents: Ministry of Education announced the results of the Outstanding Achievement Award for Scientific Research of Higher Education Institutions (Humanities and Social Sciences). A total of 648 achievements won the award, including first prize of 38 achievements, second prize of 205 achievements, third prize of 392 achievements, and 13 achievement popularization rewards. Now, we hereby release the list of awards (refer to the appendix for details).  

# Decision of the Ministry of Education on the Award for Outstanding Achievements in Scientific Research of Higher Education Institutions (Humanities and Social Sciences)  

## Sciences)  

The evaluation of the Award for Outstanding Achievements in Scientific Research of Higher Education Institutions (Humanities and Social Sciences), has been completed. According to the Ministry's "Award for Outstanding Achievements in Scientific Research in Higher Education (Humanities and Social Sciences)", a total of 648 achievements have been awarded, including 38 first prizes, 205 second prizes, 392 third prizes and 13 achievement popularization prizes, after evaluation by experts, public announcement and review by the Award Committee. Now the list of winners will be announced (see annex).  

The award evaluation work for the Outstanding Achievement Award for Scientific Research of Higher Education Institutions (Humanities and Social Sciences) is an important initiative arranged by the Ministry of Education to commend the outstanding achievements made by workers in humanities and social sciences of national higher education institutions. The purposes of the award are to encourage scientific research personnel to actively explore and dare for innovation under the guide of Marxism and principle of linking theories with practices to promote the innovation in discipline system, academic points of views

text_blocks.text_content: and scientific research methods, promote the prosperity and development of the humanities and social sciences in higher education institutions, and make a higher contribution to the construction of the socialism with Chinese characteristics. Various local education administrative authorities and higher education institutions shall take advantage of opportunities of this award evaluation work to summarize experiences, and take the guide of Deng Xiaoping Theory and the important thoughts of "Three Representatives" to carry out the scientific outlook on development, attach high importance on improving the research quality and innovation level, further enhance the social service abilities and make higher contribution to the construction of an innovation- oriented country and comprehensive achievement of the objective of building a well- off society.
Appendix: List of Winners of Outstanding Achievement Award for Scientific Research of Higher Education Institutions (Humanities and Social Sciences) (648 achievements)
Ministry of Education of the People's Republic of ChinaSeptember 4, 2009

Various local education administrative authorities and higher education institutions shall take advantage of opportunities of this award evaluation work to summarize experiences, and take the guide of Deng Xiaoping Theory and the important thoughts of "Three Representatives" to carry out the scientific outlook on development, attach high importance on improving the research quality and innovation level, further enhance the social service abilities and make higher contribution to the construction of an innovation- oriented country and comprehensive achievement of the objective of building a well- off society.

Ministry of Education of the People's Republic of ChinaSeptember 4, 2009
